query: muddy low contrast gray oppressive heavy fog smog suffocating bleak atmosphere
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: low-contrast oppressive — fog, smog, monotone gray, weak tonal separation, suffocating bleakness

response.objective_caption: A seascape showing a calm ocean surface stretching toward a horizon obscured by dense fog. A bright, diffused sun hangs in the overcast sky, casting a pale reflection onto the dark water below. The scene is devoid of visible landmarks, vessels, or figures, presenting an uninterrupted expanse of water and mist under an overcast sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A seascape showing a calm ocean surface stretching toward a horizon obscured by dense fog, rendered in muted, desaturated tones with a sickly greenish-gray cast. A bright, diffused sun hangs in the flat, low-contrast sky, casting a pale reflection onto the dark water below, while crushed midtones and an oppressive lack of directional light collapse the scene into a heavy, suffocating atmosphere. The absence of visible landmarks, vessels, or figures, combined with the sickly monotone palette and overwhelming haze, creates a mood of dread and isolation.
